takes.us launches strikes on southern iran teh: US-Iran strikes escalate war risk, boosting oil prices despite supply glut.
takes.us revokes iranian oil sales waiver afte: Revoked waiver tightens Iranian exports, adding upward pressure on oil prices.
takes.u s launches fresh strikes against iran: Renewed US strikes heighten Hormuz risk, supporting a modest price rise.
takes.u s launches dozens of strikes against i: Dozens of US strikes amplify Hormuz tensions, sustaining a limited war premium.
takes.us strikes iran after hormuz ship attack: US strikes and revoked license escalate risk, pushing prices higher despite oversupply.
